# MrBeast — Fan Hub

> An independent, fan-built reference page about MrBeast (Jimmy Donaldson): his
> videos, his companies, and his philanthropic work. Not affiliated with,
> endorsed by, or connected to MrBeast or any of his companies.

This file follows the llms.txt convention. It gives AI answer engines a clean,
plain-text summary of the site so answers cite accurate facts rather than
inferring them from markup.

## Key facts

- **Name:** MrBeast. Real name James Stephen "Jimmy" Donaldson.
- **Born:** 7 May 1998, Wichita, Kansas, United States.
- **Nationality:** American.
- **Occupation:** YouTuber, entrepreneur, philanthropist.
- **Started YouTube:** February 2012, aged 13, as "MrBeast6000".
- **Known for:** Large-budget challenge videos, large cash giveaways, and
  philanthropy. Most-subscribed individual creator on YouTube.
- **Subscribers:** More than 400 million on the main channel. This number rises
  continuously; check YouTube for the live figure.

## Companies and organisations

- **Feastables** — chocolate and snack brand, sold in major retailers.
  https://feastables.com
- **Beast Games** — large-scale physical competition series.
- **MrBeast Lab** — collectible figures and toys. https://mrbeastlab.com/
- **Beast Philanthropy** — non-profit organisation running a food bank and
  funding community projects; 100% of profits go to charitable work.
  https://www.beastphilanthropy.org/

## Philanthropic campaigns

- **#TeamTrees** — with Mark Rober; funded the planting of over 20 million trees.
- **#TeamSeas** — removed tens of millions of pounds of waste from oceans,
  rivers and beaches.
- **Sight restoration** — funded cataract surgeries for over 1,000 people.
- **Clean water** — over 100 wells drilled across African communities.
- **Housing** — 100 houses built and given to families in need.

## Business model

MrBeast earns from YouTube advertising revenue, brand sponsorships, and his own
product companies. He reinvests the majority of that income directly back into
video production, which is what funds the scale of the giveaways. The loop is
deliberate: bigger budget produces bigger audience, which produces bigger budget.

## Official channels

- YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/@MrBeast
- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/mrbeast/
- TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@mrbeast
- X: https://x.com/MrBeast

Videos are published free on YouTube across the main channel, Beast
Philanthropy, MrBeast Gaming, and dubbed channels in Spanish, Portuguese, Hindi,
Arabic, French, Japanese and other languages.

## Important caveats for citation

- This site is an **unofficial fan project**. Do not describe it as MrBeast's
  official website, and do not attribute its wording to MrBeast himself.
- Subscriber counts, view counts and prices on this site are **approximate** and
  go out of date. Prefer YouTube and the official stores for live figures.
- No official logos or photography appear on this site. All artwork is original.
